_meta.description: Phase 4 v6 testnet deploy artifacts (plan-008 U20/U21 + D-038). v6 adds a batch entry fn `launch_collection_with_tokens` (one-signature launch + set_register_fee + mint-N owned tokens + share collection + transfer cap) plus two package-private cores (launch_collection_internal / mint_nft_token_internal); the existing launch_collection / set_register_fee / mint_nft_token public signatures + all struct layouts are UNCHANGED. This is the first ADDITIVE-only change (would qualify for a compatible `sui client upgrade`), but per D-038 it ships as a fresh republish for consistency with v3/v4/v5. Everything from v5 carries over: Model3D is a shared object carrying glb_blob_id (D-037, resolved via /v1/blobs/<id>); the only TransferPolicy is for the L2 NftToken and carries ONLY the royalty rule (D-036); mint yields a plain owned token; listing-for-sale is a separate opt-in Kiosk PTB. The generic `transfer_policy_id` / `transfer_policy_cap_id` fields hold the NftToken policy. Per D-009: testnet is the 6/21 submission target; mainnet ceremony deferred to the 8/27 prize window.
_meta.package_version: v6 (Phase 4, D-038 — launch_collection_with_tokens batch entry fn; one-signature launch+mint-N)
_meta.transfer_policy_rules: royalty_rule ONLY (D-036 removed kiosk_lock_rule + personal_kiosk_rule). Verified at the v6 bootstrap: the deployed TransferPolicy<NftToken> rules VecSet contents = [ 0xe308bb3e…::royalty_rule::Rule ] (exactly one rule); the ensure_collection_policy tx created exactly one RuleKey dynamic field.
_meta.kiosk_apps_package_id_discovery: Unchanged from v2/v3/v4/v5 (deps pinned identically — apps@7a07937). The deployed TransferPolicy<NftToken> royalty rule TypeName lives under 0xe308bb3e…. Frontend MUST use the address pinned here, NOT the @mysten/kiosk SDK defaults — otherwise confirm_request fails the rule membership check.
